name: Tomato Late Blight
description: Late Blight is one of the most destructive tomato diseases. It appears as dark, water-soaked lesions on leaves that quickly turn brown and papery. Under humid conditions, a white mold may appear on the underside of leaves.
description_hi: लेट ब्लाइट टमाटर की सबसे विनाशकारी बीमारियों में से एक है। पत्तियों पर गहरे, पानी जैसे धब्बे दिखाई देते हैं।
causes: Caused by the water mould Phytophthora infestans. Spreads rapidly in cool, wet weather (10-25°C with high humidity).

severity_indicators.mild: Small water-soaked spots on a few leaves
severity_indicators.moderate: Multiple lesions, some yellowing, spreading to stems
severity_indicators.severe: Widespread necrosis, fruit infection, plant death possible

name: Tomato Early Blight
description: Early Blight causes dark brown spots with concentric rings (target-board pattern) on older, lower leaves. Severely affected leaves turn yellow and drop off.
description_hi: अर्ली ब्लाइट में पत्तियों पर गहरे भूरे रंग के गोल छल्लेदार धब्बे बनते हैं।
causes: Fungal infection favored by warm temperatures (24-29°C) and frequent rain or heavy dew.

severity_indicators.mild: A few target-spot lesions on lower leaves only
severity_indicators.moderate: Lesions on multiple leaf tiers, some defoliation

name: Potato Late Blight
description: Same pathogen as Tomato Late Blight. Causes dark blotches on leaves and cankers on stems. Infected tubers show reddish-brown rot beneath the skin.
description_hi: आलू की पत्तियों और कंदों पर भूरे-काले धब्बे और सड़न उत्पन्न करता है।
causes: Cool, moist weather accelerates spread. The spores can travel miles in wind.

name: Corn Common Rust
description: Common rust produces small, circular to elongated, cinnamon-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces. Heavy infections can cause significant yield loss.
description_hi: मक्के की पत्तियों पर दालचीनी रंग के छोटे-छोटे फफोले बनते हैं।
causes: Fungal spores spread by wind. Favored by moderate temperatures (16-23°C) and high humidity.

severity_indicators.moderate: Pustules on multiple leaves, some coalescing

name: Rice Blast
description: Rice Blast is the most economically important rice disease worldwide. It causes diamond-shaped lesions with grey centres and dark borders on leaves, and can destroy the neck of the panicle causing 'neck rot'.
description_hi: धान की पत्तियों और बालियों पर हीरे के आकार के धब्बे बनते हैं, जिससे फसल का भारी नुकसान होता है।
causes: Favored by high humidity, high nitrogen, and temperatures of 24-28°C. Spreads via airborne spores.

severity_indicators.mild: Small leaf spots, no neck infection
severity_indicators.moderate: Spreading leaf blast, some nodes infected
severity_indicators.severe: Neck rot, panicle death, whitehead visible

name: Wheat Leaf Rust
description: Leaf rust causes small, round to oval, orange-red powdery pustules on the upper surface of leaves. It is the most widespread wheat rust disease globally.
description_hi: गेहूं की पत्तियों पर नारंगी-लाल रंग के छोटे पाउडर जैसे फफोले बनते हैं।
causes: Wind-dispersed spores. Favored by temperatures of 15-22°C and leaf wetness.

severity_indicators.mild: Few pustules on lower leaves only
severity_indicators.moderate: Pustules on flag leaf, some coalescing
severity_indicators.severe: Heavy infection on all leaves, early senescence
